# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: "authentication.k8s.io/v1alpha1"
kind: "Policy"
metadata:
  name: "default-policy"
  namespace: "<insert namespace here>"  # make sure to provide namespace name where policy will be created, not linkerd namespace!
spec:
   rules:
     - selector: {}
       generators:
         - kind: ServiceAccounts
           forNames:
             - '*'
    - kind: Pods
      matchLabels:
        name: prometheus-deployment
    - kind: Services
      matchLabels:
        name: kube-dns
    - kind: Pods
      matchLabels:
        name: grafana-deployment
    - kind: ServiceAccounts
      forNames:
        - '*'
